title: Super Duper Mega Optimize
description: A modpack consisting of a large number of mods that effectively increases FPS
body:
![Modpack, consisting of a considerable number of mods, effectively optimizing the game](https://i.imgur.com/q49z5K3.png)

## **Modpack, consisting of a considerable number of mods, effectively optimizing the game**

### **The main advantages of the modpack:**
**🔥 Fast world loading** </br>
**🔥 20% more FPS compared to pure Sodium** </br>
**🔥 Minor amount of lag after world creation** </br>
**🔥 Minor fixes to item models** </br>
**🔥 Optimization without affecting the graphics part of the game** </br>
**🔥 Optimizing RAM consumption** </br>

_**Don't download the modpack from anywhere else but curseforge and modrinth!**_

_The Super Duper Mega Optimize modpack is licensed only with respect to its branding elements, including the logo, name, and promotional imagery. All included mods, along with their respective code and assets, remain under the individual licenses assigned by their original creators._
